Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Catalyzes the first committed step in flavonoid biosynthesis
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses 4-coumaroyl-CoA and malonyl-CoA to form naringenin chalcone

Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Sequence similarity to known CHI genes

Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates naringenin to form dihydrokaempferol
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Sequence similarity to known F3H genes

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Introduces B-ring hydroxylation for quercetin production
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Key enzyme determining quercetin vs kaempferol ratio
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates dihydrokaempferol at 3' position to form dihydroquercetin

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Introduces additional B-ring hydroxylation for delphinidin production
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydroxylates dihydrokaempferol at 3' and 5' positions
Converts dihydrokaempferol to kaempferol and dihydroquercetin to quercetin

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Ortholog search using apple MdCDRB as bait
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Identified through ortholog search with apple gene
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Reduces p-coumaroyl-CoA in dihydrochalcone pathway

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Pathway analysis based on metabolite patterns
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Methylates flavonol aglycones

Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Recombinant protein assay, overexpression in Arabidopsis, VIGS in tomato
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Functionally validated in the study; also called SlUGT78D-a
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers glucose from UDP-glucose to flavonol aglycones at 3-O position
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Enzymatic_Function: Recombinant protein assay showed activity with quercetin and UDP-glucose
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: forms immediate precursor for further decoration

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Adds apiose to flavonol-3-O-glucosides at 2'' position
Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Also called SlUGT79B-b; highly expressed in HABR leaves
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers apiose to flavonol-3-O-glucosides at the 2'' position of glucose
Pathway_Genes.Evidence_for_Pathway_Position: Metabolite absence in CHMI and NEOR where gene not expressed

Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Adds rhamnose to flavonol-3-O-glucosides at 6'' position
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Pathway analysis based on metabolite patterns
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Transfers rhamnose to flavonol-3-O-glucosides at the 6'' position of glucose

Pathway_Genes.Notes_or_Other_Important_Info: Also called SlUGT73B-a; requires further characterization

Title: Exploiting Natural Variation in Tomato to Define Pathway Structure and Metabolic Regulation of Fruit Polyphenolics in the Lycopersicum Complex
